Container.Name: dockerdiscordcontrol
Container.Overview: Control your Docker containers directly from Discord![br][br] [b]CONTAINER CONTROL[/b][br] Start, Stop, Restart containers via interactive Discord buttons[br] Live logs viewer (real-time container output in Discord)[br] Custom container info (WAN IP, ports, password-protected data)[br][br] [b]TASK SCHEDULER[/b][br] Automated tasks: Once, Daily, Weekly, Monthly, Yearly[br] Manage via Discord buttons or the Web UI[br][br] [b]AUTO-ACTION SYSTEM[/b][br] Trigger container actions from Discord messages[br] Keyword, fuzzy, and regex matching with cooldowns[br][br] [b]CHANNEL PERMISSIONS[/b][br] Status Channels: Community sees status, admins get full control[br] Control Channels: Everyone gets full access[br] Per-container permissions (Status, Start, Stop, Restart)[br] Configurable admin users and spam protection[br][br] [b]MORE FEATURES[/b][br] Multi-Language: English, German, French[br] Status Watchdog (Dead Man's Switch with ping URL)[br] Mech Evolution System (11 stages with animations)[br] Web Dashboard for configuration and monitoring[br] Alpine 3.23.3, less than 200MB RAM[br][br] [b]SETUP[/b][br] 1. Create a Discord bot token[br] 2. Access Web UI at http://[YOUR-IP]:9374[br] 3. Login with admin/setup, then set your password[br][br] [b][a href="https://ddc.bot"]Homepage[/a] | [a href="https://github.com/DockerDiscordControl/DockerDiscordControl/wiki"]Wiki[/a][/b]
Container.Changes:
###v2.2.0 (2026-03-25) **Channel Translation** - NEW: Automatic message translation between Discord channels (DeepL, Google, Microsoft) - NEW: Video/image/file forwarding with translations - NEW: YouTube/Twitter/Twitch URL auto-preview in translations - NEW: Configurable Original link and provider footer toggles - FIXED: Web UI console errors (JS scoping, log auto-refresh)
###v2.1.9 (2026-03-21) **Critical Channel Save Fix** - FIXED: Jinja2 scoping bug causing admin channels to be deleted on save - FIXED: Channel delete button not working in Web UI for existing rows - FIXED: False port diagnostics warnings at startup
###v2.1.8 (2026-03-21) **Channel Config and Startup Fixes** - FIXED: Channel config fallback chain (individual files, config.json, legacy) - FIXED: Auto-migration from legacy channel format to individual files - FIXED: Config cache staleness at bot startup (force reload) - IMPROVED: Reduced config.json writes from N+2 to 1 per save cycle
###v2.1.7 (2026-03-20) **Security Patch** - FIXED: CVE-2026-32767 (Critical): expat XML parsing vulnerability - FIXED: CVE-2025-60876: Busybox wget HTTP header injection (wget removed)
###v2.1.2 (2025-11-28) **Unraid Permission Fix** - NEW: PUID/PGID environment variables for NAS compatibility - FIXED: Permission errors on Unraid systems
###v2.0.0 (2025-11-18) **Complete Rewrite** - NEW: Multi-language support (English, German, French) - NEW: Mech Evolution system with 11 stages - NEW: Task scheduler, auto-actions, status watchdog - NEW: Alpine Linux base image
Container.Requires: Docker socket access for container management. Create a Discord bot token before first use.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file permissions. Unraid default: 99 (nobody).

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file permissions. Unraid default: 100 (users).

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: Password for web UI admin user (username: admin). If not set, use admin/setup for first login.

Config.Name: Flask Secret Key
Config.Description: Secret key for session security. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32. If not set, sessions reset on restart.

Config.Name: Discord Bot Token
Config.Description: Discord bot token. Can also be configured via the Web UI after first login.
